M8/#624, COMM S KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON PRESENT: MICHAEL ROSSOFF & PLTF NEVEO MOSSER, BRENT KERNAN & DEFTS BETTY & DAVID ROBINSON. CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: DEFTS TO REMAIN ON PREMISES, AGREE TO PAY RENT ON THE 1ST BEGINNING ON 3-1-98. JAN & FEB 98 RENT TENDERED IN COURT ($1407.38). DEFTS HELD TO LANDLORD'S STANDARD LEASE UNLESS THEY PROVIDE A COPY OF A PREVIOUSLY SIGNED LEASE W/IN 1 WK. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. NO RELEASE/WAIVER. PLNTF WILL MAKE THE FOLLOWING REPAIRS: LIGHT IN PANTRY, COVER PLATE BEHIND REFRIGERATOR, CARPET IN BETTY'S BEDROOM/HALLWAY. PEELING PAIN IN MASTER BEDROOM, WRAP EXPOSED HOT WATER PIPE & SEAL HOLE AT TOP OF IRON PIPE IN DAVID'S BEDROOM. TENANTS TO MOVE OWN FURNITURE W/IN 24 HRS NOTICE. PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WHEN CHECK CLEARS.
